name: Diabetic Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook raisins until soft and drain.
2. Mix the cooked raisins with applesauce, eggs, artificial sweetener (equal to 1 cup of sugar), oil, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, vanilla, and salt.
3. Combine flour with the remaining ingredients in a separate bowl.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 8-inch x 8-inch or 9-inch x 9-inch pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for the specified time.
